attacking_style: Insufficient data to establish clear attacking patterns. Monument result suggests ability to survive and compete in final selections rather than long-range attacks.

terrain_preference: Wet cobblestones appear to be a strength based on Paris-Roubaix performance. Monument-level paved classics suit his capabilities.
